message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value

actor "User" as user
participant "libdrift" as libdrift
rectangle "drift service" {
    participant "Advertisement channel" as adv_channel
    participant "Control channel" as ctrl_channel
    participant "driftd" as driftd
}
participant "Neo4j" as neo4j
participant "MongoDB" as mongo

user -> libdrift : get Part value
note left of libdrift: Retrieval message contains\nindex specifier\nindex value
libdrift -> ctrl_channel : send retrieval message
ctrl_channel --> user : ACK
ctrl_channel -> driftd : get Part value
driftd -> driftd : Lookup Part UUID in index
driftd -> neo4j : Get Part info
alt [Composite Part]
    loop [foreach Part]
        driftd -> neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
        driftd -> mongo : Get Part values
    end
else [Simple Part]
    driftd -> neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
    driftd -> mongo : Get Part values
end
driftd -> driftd : build update message
driftd -> adv_channel : Update messages for Part values
adv_channel -> user : receive update message

@enduml
```
